source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'IFIL_NewJoinees_ContainerName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'SSIS_demo_CF_V1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DFT1_') AS IFIL_NewJoinees_ContainerName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'IFIL_NewJoinees_FileName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'SSIS_demo_CF_V1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DFT1_') AS IFIL_NewJoinees_FileName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'IFIL_NewJoinees_FilePath' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'SSIS_demo_CF_V1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DFT1_') AS IFIL_NewJoinees_FilePath,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'TBL_Manager_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'SSIS_demo_CF_V1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DFT1_') AS TBL_Manager_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'TBL_Manager_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'SSIS_demo_CF_V1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DFT1_') AS TBL_Manager_TableName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Lookup_LKP_TABLE_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'SSIS_demo_CF_V1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DFT1_') AS Lookup_LKP_TABLE_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Lookup_LKP_TABLE_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'SSIS_demo_CF_V1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DFT1_') AS Lookup_LKP_TABLE_TableName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Dest_File_ContainerName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'SSIS_demo_CF_V1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DFT1_') AS Dest_File_ContainerName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Dest_File_FileName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'SSIS_demo_CF_V1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DFT1_') AS Dest_File_FileName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Dest_File_FilePath' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'SSIS_demo_CF_V1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DFT1_') AS Dest_File_FilePath,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'SSIS_demo_CF_V1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DFT1_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'SSIS_demo_CF_V1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DFT1_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_TableName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Dest_File_DFT1__source_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'SSIS_demo_CF_V1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Dest_File_DFT1_') AS Dest_File_DFT1__source_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Dest_File_DFT1__source_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'SSIS_demo_CF_V1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Dest_File_DFT1_') AS Dest_File_DFT1__source_TableName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Dest_File_DFT1__sink_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'SSIS_demo_CF_V1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Dest_File_DFT1_') AS Dest_File_DFT1__sink_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Dest_File_DFT1__sink_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'SSIS_demo_CF_V1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Dest_File_DFT1_') AS Dest_File_DFT1__sink_TableName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_DFT1__source_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'SSIS_demo_CF_V1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_DFT1_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_DFT1__source_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_DFT1__source_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'SSIS_demo_CF_V1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_DFT1_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_DFT1__source_TableName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_DFT1__sink_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'SSIS_demo_CF_V1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_DFT1_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_DFT1__sink_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_DFT1__sink_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'SSIS_demo_CF_V1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_DFT1_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_DFT1__sink_TableName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Dest_File_DFT1__source_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'SSIS_demo_CF_V1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Dest_File_DFT1_') AS Dest_File_DFT1__source_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Dest_File_DFT1__source_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'SSIS_demo_CF_V1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Dest_File_DFT1_') AS Dest_File_DFT1__source_TableName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Dest_File_DFT1__sink_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'SSIS_demo_CF_V1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Dest_File_DFT1_') AS Dest_File_DFT1__sink_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Dest_File_DFT1__sink_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'SSIS_demo_CF_V1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Dest_File_DFT1_') AS Dest_File_DFT1__sink_TableName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_DFT1__source_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'SSIS_demo_CF_V1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_DFT1_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_DFT1__source_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_DFT1__source_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'SSIS_demo_CF_V1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_DFT1_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_DFT1__source_TableName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_DFT1__sink_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'SSIS_demo_CF_V1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_DFT1_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_DFT1__sink_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_DFT1__sink_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'SSIS_demo_CF_V1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_DFT1_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_DFT1__sink_TableName;
